languages.text: {n}По толпе пробегает довольный гул. Ведка вскидывает руку с когтями.{/n} "Мы созданы для великих дел и благодарность наша династии не ведает границ!"
{n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"
languages.original_text: {n}По толпе пробегает довольный гул. Ведка вскидывает руку с когтями.{/n} "Мы созданы для великих дел и благодарность наша династии не ведает границ!"

languages.text: {n}人群中荡开一阵满意的低语。薇德卡将她那只利爪般的手举向空中。{/n}“我们生来就是为了更伟大的事业，我们对王朝的感激之情永无止境！”
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"

traits.locale_text: {n}人群中荡开一阵满意的低语。薇德卡将她那只利爪般的手举向空中。{/n}“我们生来就是为了更伟大的事业，我们对王朝的感激之情永无止境！”

languages.text: {n}Kalabalığın içinden memnuniyet dolu bir mırıltı dalgalanıyor. Vedka, pençeli elini havaya kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bizler daha büyük şeyler için doğduk. Hanedanlığa olan minnettarlığımızın sınırı yoktur!"
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Kalabalığın içinden memnuniyet dolu bir mırıltı dalgalanıyor. Vedka, pençeli elini havaya kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bizler daha büyük şeyler için doğduk. Hanedanlığa olan minnettarlığımızın sınırı yoktur!"

languages.text: {n}Un grondement satisfait envahit la foule. Vedka lève sa main griffue en l'air.{/n} « Nous sommes destinés à de grandes choses, et notre gratitude envers la dynastie est inébranlable ! »
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grondement satisfait envahit la foule. Vedka lève sa main griffue en l'air.{/n} « Nous sommes destinés à de grandes choses, et notre gratitude envers la dynastie est inébranlable ! »

languages.text: {n}Un susurro de satisfacción se extiende entre la multitud. Vedka alza el puño con garras en el aire.{/n} «¡Renacemos para la grandeza y nuestra gratitud a la dinastía no conoce límites!».
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un susurro de satisfacción se extiende entre la multitud. Vedka alza el puño con garras en el aire.{/n} «¡Renacemos para la grandeza y nuestra gratitud a la dinastía no conoce límites!».

languages.text: {n}Ein zufriedenes Raunen geht durch die Menge. Vedka reckt ihre Klauenhand in die Luft.{/n} "Wir sind für größere Dinge geboren und unsere Dankbarkeit gegenüber der Dynastie kennt keine Grenzen!"
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein zufriedenes Raunen geht durch die Menge. Vedka reckt ihre Klauenhand in die Luft.{/n} "Wir sind für größere Dinge geboren und unsere Dankbarkeit gegenüber der Dynastie kennt keine Grenzen!"

languages.text: {n}満足げなため息が群衆に広がった。ヴェドカは爪を立てた手を空に突き上げた。{/n}「我々はより偉大なもののために生まれた。王朝への感謝の念は尽きることがない！」
languages.original_text: {n}A satisfied hum ripples through the crowd. Vedka thrusts her clawed hand into the air.{/n} "We are born for greater things, and our gratitude to the dynasty knows no bounds!"
